channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Teenagers sue Musk's xAI claiming image-generator made sexually explicit images of them as minors
item.description: Three teenagers in Tennessee have sued Elon Musk’s xAI, claiming the company’s image-generation tools were used to morph real photos of them into explicitly sexual images.
item.dc:creator: Travis Loller, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: CISA urges IT to harden endpoint management systems after cyberattack by pro-Iranian group
item.description: The US is urging infosec leaders to harden their endpoint management system configurations after last week’s hack of American medical supplies provider Stryker by pro-Iranian threat actor Handala.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Don’t get too used to ‘subsidized’ chatbot costs
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Maryam Banikarim on career chaos, C-suite pressure, and betting on yourself
item.description: Career disruption is accelerating across the economy—and few people have navigated it more boldly than Maryam Banikarim.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Wall-climbing robots swarm US Navy warships
item.description: The Fox News AI Newsletter gives readers the latest AI technology advancements, covering the challenges and opportunities AI presents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Traffic is dying as a media metric. What comes next is more important
item.description: Day by day there’s more evidence that AI is eating up the media world. A recent report from Growtika, a self-described SEO and AI search agency, analyzed data from the search analytics platform Ahrefs to show that traffic to many tech media sites is way down over the past couple of years.
item.dc:creator: Pete Pachal, Fast Company

item.title: The UK may require AI-generated content to be labeled
item.description: The United Kingdom is may introduce labeling requirements for AI-generated content as part of a broader review of copyright law, Reuters reports. The aim is to make it easier for consumers to identify material created by AI and protect them against threats such as deepfakes and disinformation.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Snowflake’s new ‘autonomous’ AI layer aims to do the work, not just answer questions
item.description: Snowflake has taken the covers off a product, currently under development, which it describes as an “autonomous” AI layer that promises to turn its data cloud from a place that answers questions about data into one that actually does the work: stitching together analysis, reports, and even slide dec
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft’s laser-free cable tech promises to slash AI data center networking power bills
item.description: Microsoft Research has developed MOSAIC, a MicroLED-based optical interconnect system for data centers that it estimates will use about 50% less energy than mainstream laser-based optical cables when deployed, the company said in a blog post.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Your new on-demand Android memo machine
item.description: Sometimes, simple sure is tough to beat. In tech today, it’s all too easy to get lost in a sea of complexity — and to drown in desperate-seeming solutions for problems that don’t actually exist. (And that, ahem, is putting it nicely.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: USAT Leverages Times Square Crowd to Demonstrate Instant Digital Dollar Payments
item.description: USAT is transforming Times Square into a live demonstration of instant, internet-native payments. The digital dollar, issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, is taking over Times Square as 2 million spectators flood the streets of New York City for St. Patrick’s Day.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia targets inference as AI’s next battleground with Groq 3 LPX
item.description: 2026 is predicted to be the year that AI moves from pilot to production, becoming measurably useful across the enterprise. But while many businesses are ready, the underlying infrastructure doesn’t seem to be, particularly when it comes to next-stage inferencing.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft shuffles more of its senior AI leadership
item.description: The senior leadership shuffle at Microsoft continued on Tuesday when company CEO Satya Nadella announced that the company is unifying the commercial and consumer Copilot systems in a new division overseen by Jacob Andreou.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The email trick that reveals your hidden online accounts
item.description: Searching your email inbox for old sign-up messages or account updates can reveal forgotten online accounts and help reduce your digital footprint.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
